name: Mistral 7B
metaDescription: Mistral 7B (Mistral AI), released 2023-09-27 — part of the Mistral 7B / Nemo (open dense) line. Mistral's debut open model; 7.3B params, Apache 2.0.
overview: Mistral 7B is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral 7B / Nemo (open dense) line. Released 2023-09-27. Legacy open-weight dense base models.
What's notable in this version: Mistral's debut open model; 7.3B params, Apache 2.0.
